name: NIQ Global Intelligence plc
business: NIQ Global Intelligence plc is a leading global consumer intelligence company that provides data, analytics, and software solutions to brands, retailers, and other clients to help them understand consumer shopping behavior. The company's products are organized into Intelligence (81% of revenue) and Activation (19% of revenue), sold primarily through subscription contracts.

exposures.sentence: We have invested approximately $400 million to transform our technology platform into a cloud-based scalable technology platform, with natively embedded AI capabilities
We established a leading position in global eCommerce and omnichannel coverage through strategic acquisitions and organic product enhancement.

Security breaches, improper access to or disclosure of our data or our clients data, or other cyber incidents could result in liability, cause harm to our reputation and business, or subject us to regulatory penalties.
We are a leading global consumer intelligence company positioned at the nexus of brands, retailers and consumers.
Our solutions enable executives, sales leaders, marketers, category management teams, media leaders and research and development teams

tamClaims.claim: Global consumer spend is estimated at $65 trillion during 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Global consumer spend is estimated at $65 trillion during 2025.

tamClaims.claim: More than $7.4 trillion in global consumer spend as of December 31, 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Our global reach spans 90 countries, covering approximately 82% of the world's population, more than half of global gross domestic product (GDP) and more than $7.4 trillion in global consumer spend as of December 31, 2025.
